params.name: Charles' Gold Ticket
params.description:
On Aug 15, 1985 AD, Charles found this golden voucher within the chocolate he bought with the money he picked up.
Golden vouchers were issued by Willy Wonk, owner of the Wonk Chocolate Factory. Anyone lucky enough to get one would be eligible to visit the factory. Charles, a poor boy who got this golden voucher by chance, embarked on his dream tour of the factory. After many wondrous experiences, the other 4 children on the tour with Charles had to leave early due to their greed. That is when …
